description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a wide, black screen bordered by a thin, matte black bezel, and the television sits on a sturdy, metallic stand with a broad base for stability. The rear panel is mostly flat with subtle geometric detailing, likely for ventilation and mounting, and includes a central mounting point. The side views reveal the television's ultra-thin design, with a slight bulge at the lower back where internal components are housed. The bottom right corner of the front bezel appears to have a small cluster of control buttons. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for both residential and public urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, large display, and metallic stand. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with subtle rear detailing and a slim profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black screen, thin bezel, and metallic stand; control buttons are visible on the bottom right edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the television's ultra-thin profile and the slight bulge at the lower back for internal components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat back panel with geometric detailing, central mounting point, and the metallic stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slimness and the lower back bulge for housing electronics.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin, matte black bezel with a minimalist, rectangular profile and subtle styling.
attribute_control_button_layout: row of buttons on the bottom right edge of the front bezel
